texto: Toleration is the greatest gift of the mind
autor: it requires the same effort of the brain that it takes to balance oneself on a bicycle.
explicacao: Citação de it requires the same effort of the brain that it takes to balance oneself on a bicycle. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Toleration is the greatest gift of the mind” articula reflexao, helen-keller, toleration em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
